# Vendored headers

This directory vendors header-only dependencies used by the C++ code in this package.

- xtensor: https://github.com/alrobles/xtensor.git @ master
- xtl: https://github.com/xtensor-stack/xtl.git @ master
- xsimd: https://github.com/xtensor-stack/xsimd.git @ master

Vendored by: scripts/vendor-xtensor.sh
